title: Configurable prefix for item ID
excerpt: Need a way to create and assign ID for each of items with specific prefix. For example, I would like to have an items created with a prefix like “SE-” followed by automatically assigned sequence number by Monday.com

posts.author: ianhuang10310 (Ian Huang)
posts.cookedHtml: Need a way to create and assign ID for each of items with specific prefix. For example, I would like to have an items created with a prefix like “SE-” followed by automatically assigned sequence number by Monday.com

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @ianhuang10310,

You might be interested in this app. It does exactly what you are requesting for.
